source: Derived from wset3_questions.json RA field distribution (616 questions). RA labels extracted from expected_topics field; 11 questions have no RA label (unclassified). RA5 content observed to cover storage, commercial wine conservation, and mixed topics not fitting RA1-RA4.

ra_targets.name: Factors affecting style and quality
ra_targets.description: Climate, viticulture, soil, grape growing, winemaking processes, SAT, oak, fermentation, MLF, botrytis, ageing potential
ra_targets.notes: Largest block; covers RA1 theory foundation (climate, viticulture, winemaking). Coverage appears proportionate to exam scope.

ra_targets.name: Still wines of the world
ra_targets.description: Regions — France, Germany, Spain, Portugal, Italy, New World (Argentina, Australia, Chile, USA, South Africa, New Zealand)
ra_targets.notes: Second largest block; good proportional coverage of regional wine knowledge.

ra_targets.name: Sparkling wines and fortified wines
ra_targets.description: Champagne, Cava, Prosecco, Sekt, Crémant; Sherry, Port, Madeira, Marsala
ra_targets.notes: Fortified and sparkling combined. Under-represented relative to the exam scope weight (~15% in typical WSET L3 exam). Flor, solera, tirage, dosage topics may have gaps.

ra_targets.name: Storage and service
ra_targets.description: Wine storage, serving conditions, faults, labelling, food and wine pairing
ra_targets.notes: Service and storage topics. Proportionate to exam scope (~5-10%).

ra_targets.name: RA5 (system-defined extended topics)
ra_targets.description: Additional topics not fitting RA1-RA4; observed to include commercial wine conservation, mixed theory blocks 11-15
ra_targets.notes: Internal classification only; RA5 is not a standard WSET L3 result area designation. Topic scope derived from observed question content. Blocks 11-15 cover mixed topics.

session_composer_rules.notes: Rules are targets for future Session Composer; not yet enforced by any runtime component. ENABLE_PEDAGOGICAL_STRATEGY_LAYER must remain False until explicitly authorized.

coverage_notes.sba_schema_readiness_notes: All 616 questions lack diagnostic_sba_item_v1 schema fields: distractor_role, source_chunks, misconception_id, attempt analytics placeholders, uses_llm=false flag
coverage_notes.open_response_notes: 21 short_answer type questions are open-response candidates; should be preserved separately from SBA migration
